_instructions: Three one-time signups replace 10+ individual program approvals. Fill these in once, save, and every link on the site starts earning.

skimlinks._what: Self-serve JS auto-monetizer. Sign up at signup.skimlinks.com (~5 min). No KYC until first payout. Drop the publisher ID below.

partnerstack._what: Apply once → access Notion, beehiiv, Jasper, Webflow, Pipedrive (5 programs under one approval). Payout via PayPal.
partnerstack._after_signup: Add the per-program referral links you receive to the entries below (notion, beehiiv, jasper, webflow, pipedrive)

impact._what: Apply once → access Canva, ConvertKit, HubSpot, Semrush, ActiveCampaign (and ~50 more).
impact._after_signup: Add the per-program referral links you receive to the entries below

direct_programs._note: Direct signups you do once. Highest-paying programs that pay outside networks. Approval is instant or quick.

network_programs._note: Once you sign up to a network above, paste per-program referral links here. The site auto-rewires all buttons.

_checkout_flow._skimlinks_action: When publisher_id is set AND a user's data-aff slug has no href here, the link still fires (browser navigates to plain vendor URL). Skimlinks then auto-monetizes that hop as an affiliate redirect at the moment the user clicks. Net effect: 100% of links on the site become monetizable even before you finish network approvals.
